title: tzeltalia calidaria
intro: Tzeltalia calidaria, a flowering plant native to tropical regions, is also known as the 'Wild Cinnamon' or 'Mexican Cinnamon'. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Tzeltalia calidaria include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
